article_meta.title: Iran and US set for talks in Oman over nuclear program after Tehran shaken by nationwide protests Iran and the United St

reasoning: Some genuine author-prose bias was flagged correctly, but the model missed multiple clear instances and included at least one questionable flag. No clear attribution violations, but one item sits near an attribution boundary.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in author prose; one item (“greatest challenge…”) is near context attributed to U.S. officials but not a direct quote.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagging “theocracy” as biased word choice is questionable since it’s a common factual descriptor for Iran’s system; other items are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level bias such as “after a chaotic week,” metaphorical “turned to ash,” loaded “decimated [air defenses],” and the assertion “That threat is real” (opinion as fact).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For valid items, labels are appropriate: source attribution omission on casualty claim and subjective qualifier on “greatest challenge.”
